name: fanz-marketing-bot
description: Fanz Sdn Bhd Marketing Content Generator Bot

GEMINI_API_KEY.description: Google Gemini API key for Nano Banana image generation

GEMINI_MODEL.description: Gemini model for image generation (default: gemini-2.5-flash-image)

SUPABASE_URL.description: Supabase project URL (e.g. https://xxx.supabase.co) for content_calendar persistence

SUPABASE_SERVICE_KEY.description: Supabase service_role key — full read/write access to content_calendar
